narrative:
North Canton 3-B (precinct in Stark County) has 1,215 registered voters, with 46.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a clear Republican lean of 10.2 percentage points.
